---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the bug. Add screenshot if possible -->

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
<!-- What should happen? -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happens? Include error messages or screenshots if relevant. -->

## Impact & Priority

**Impact** — how badly does this affect the experience?
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — app is unusable or data is lost
- [ ] 🟠 High — core feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low — cosmetic issue or edge case

**Priority** — how urgently should this be fixed?
- [ ] P0 — blocker, fix immediately
- [ ] P1 — fix in the next release
- [ ] P2 — fix when possible
- [ ] P3 — low urgency / nice to have

## Additional Context
<!-- Logs, screenshots, related issues, or anything else that might help. -->
